label: Hediff wound
description: Associates a specific hediff with a list of wound overlays that replace the generic ones when that hediff is present. Nested class inside FleshTypeDef.

onlyHumanlikes.label: Only humanlikes
onlyHumanlikes.description: Only apply these wound overlays to humanlike pawns. Defaults to true.

hediff.label: Hediff
hediff.description: The hediff this entry matches. When a pawn has this hediff the wound overlays in this group are selected.

wounds.label: Wounds
wounds.description: Wound overlays to render when the matched hediff is present on a pawn of this flesh type.
